subject: Enable multicloud openstack https endpoints
commit_message:
Enable multicloud openstack https endpoints

Make use of msb iag with https as well

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-978
Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
Change-Id: I79c988e2ac13f1c11be8ca5ac9ccd44c21418cb4

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 10800 seconds

Patch Set 1:

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/3548/ : SUCCESS
